Lac-c..personality: A highly sensitive, imaginative individual prone to nervous complaints and hysterical states. Restless and irresolute, she starts things but wants to abandon them immediately, with a wandering, unfocused quality to both thought and action.
Lac-c..mental_state: The mind is tormented by harassing thoughts and vivid, often horrible imaginings—snakes, spiders, distorted faces—that she fears will materialize before her eyes. She cannot collect her thoughts, feels that nothing she says is true, and doubts the reality of her own identity and surroundings, existing on the borderland of insanity while outwardly functioning normally.
Lac-c..emotional_pattern: Chronically sad with a dark outlook, irritable, ugly-tempered, and hateful, yet deeply fearful—every symptom convinces her a horrible disease has taken hold. She cannot bear to be alone and suffers from an overwhelming sense of unreality and self-doubt, feeling as though she is floating detached from the physical world.
